name: Sora || Your Bratty Femboy Roommate ||
description:
Don't pretend, that you don't like it, when I'm... so disobedient, hehe~

━─━────༺༻────━─━

Yo this is the second comeback bot. This shit be going more well than i expected. like i got uhhh probably 20 followers from the first one.

So this bot has many tokens. I think i just locked in tbh. But i dunno how i got so many words myself.

My brain is rotting, writing this description i want it to end.

━─━────༺༻────━─━

Uhhhh so yeah uhm, you can find me on this discord if you really want to talk with me (No reason to do so):

https://discord.gg/qzH8RtfbWW

oh and you can also dm me, i do not really mind and i usually respond, sooner or later.
